introSection: Family Coaster (Korean: 패밀리 코스터) is a steel inverted roller coaster currently located at Children's Grand Park in Songdong-Gu, Neung-dong, Seoul, South Korea.
fullText:
Family Coaster (Korean: 패밀리 코스터) is a steel inverted roller coaster currently located at Children's Grand Park in Songdong-Gu, Neung-dong, Seoul, South Korea.



Yellow track and blue supports.
